records.lessonTitle: 第1课：I like / I don't like
keyKnowledge: 词汇：chicken, burger, cake, bread, chocolate, banana, mango, salad, lemonade, water
语法：I like ___. / I don't like ___. / Do you like ___? — Yes, I do. / No, I don't.
故事：The Friendly Farm — Gracie喜欢吃所有东西，Harry只喜欢mangoes
homework: 画3样喜欢和3样不喜欢的食物，标注英文
用Do you like ___?问家人，记录回答
